title: B1 Listening Part 1 - Test 50
instructions: For each question, listen to the recording and choose the correct answer: A, B or C.

items.context: You hear two people talking about a lost trainers.
items.audio_script: Boy: Did you finally find your trainers? You looked everywhere before class this morning. || Girl: Yes, but not where I expected. I checked the sports hall, because I remembered using it there yesterday. || Boy: And did you try the bus stop? You said you went there afterwards. || Girl: I did, but nobody had seen it. Then my dad sent me a message and said [1]I had left my trainers in the car boot[/1]. I must have put it there without noticing. || Boy: What a relief. You will need it later. || Girl: Exactly. I'll pick it up before lunch.

dialogue.speaker: boy
dialogue.text: Did you finally find your trainers? You looked everywhere before class this morning.

dialogue.speaker: girl
dialogue.text: Yes, but not where I expected. I checked the sports hall, because I remembered using it there yesterday.

dialogue.speaker: boy
dialogue.text: And did you try the bus stop? You said you went there afterwards.

dialogue.speaker: girl
dialogue.text: I did, but nobody had seen it. Then my dad sent me a message and said I had left my trainers in the car boot. I must have put it there without noticing.

dialogue.speaker: boy
dialogue.text: What a relief. You will need it later.

dialogue.speaker: girl
dialogue.text: Exactly. I'll pick it up before lunch.

items.question: Where are the trainers?
items.explanation: The speaker says they had left the trainers in the car boot.

items.context: You hear two friends making plans for the afternoon.
items.audio_script: Woman: Are we still going to go to the beach after school? I was looking forward to it. || Man: I don't think so. It is much too windy, so that plan will not work today. || Woman: We could play volleyball instead. That might be fun. || Man: I checked, but two players are ill. My cousin had a different idea: [2]we are going to visit the new shopping centre this afternoon[/2]. || Woman: That sounds good. Shall we meet near the station? || Man: Yes, at four o'clock. Then we can go together before dinner.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Are we still going to go to the beach after school? I was looking forward to it.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: I don't think so. It is much too windy, so that plan will not work today.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: We could play volleyball instead. That might be fun.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: I checked, but two players are ill. My cousin had a different idea: we are going to visit the new shopping centre this afternoon.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: That sounds good. Shall we meet near the station?

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: Yes, at four o'clock. Then we can go together before dinner.

items.question: What are the friends going to do?
items.explanation: The speaker says they are going to visit the new shopping centre this afternoon.

items.context: You hear two students talking about the evening concert.
items.audio_script: Woman: Have you packed for the evening concert tomorrow? I'm trying not to take things I will not use. || Girl: Almost. I was going to bring a large bag, but the teacher said we will not need that there. || Woman: What about a drink bottle? Do we need that? || Girl: Not this time. The message says [3]everyone needs to bring a warm jumper because the event is outside and finishes late[/3]. || Woman: Thanks for telling me. I will put it in my bag now. || Girl: Good idea. We leave early, and there will not be time to go back home.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Have you packed for the evening concert tomorrow? I'm trying not to take things I will not use.

dialogue.speaker: girl
dialogue.text: Almost. I was going to bring a large bag, but the teacher said we will not need that there.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: What about a drink bottle? Do we need that?

dialogue.speaker: girl
dialogue.text: Not this time. The message says everyone needs to bring a warm jumper because the event is outside and finishes late.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Thanks for telling me. I will put it in my bag now.

dialogue.speaker: girl
dialogue.text: Good idea. We leave early, and there will not be time to go back home.

items.question: What should the student take?
items.explanation: The speaker says everyone needs to bring a warm jumper because the event is outside and finishes late.

items.context: You hear two people choosing food in a cafe.
items.audio_script: Man: Have you chosen what to order for lunch? The queue is getting longer behind us. || Boy: Not yet. I considered the cheese roll, but I brought one yesterday. || Man: What about the curry? It looks good today. || Boy: I thought about that too, but it is too spicy for me. I think [4]I'll have the vegetable soup because it comes with fresh bread[/4]. || Man: Good choice. I'll decide while you pay. || Boy: Fine. Let's find seats by the window before all the tables are taken. We still have time before class begins.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: Have you chosen what to order for lunch? The queue is getting longer behind us.

dialogue.speaker: boy
dialogue.text: Not yet. I considered the cheese roll, but I brought one yesterday.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: What about the curry? It looks good today.

dialogue.speaker: boy
dialogue.text: I thought about that too, but it is too spicy for me. I think I'll have the vegetable soup because it comes with fresh bread.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: Good choice. I'll decide while you pay.

dialogue.speaker: boy
dialogue.text: Fine. Let's find seats by the window before all the tables are taken. We still have time before class begins.

items.question: What food does the speaker choose?
items.explanation: The speaker chooses the vegetable soup because it comes with fresh bread.

items.context: You hear two students talking about the film group.
items.audio_script: Woman: Did you see the message about the film group this afternoon? I was going straight to the media room. || Man: Do not go there, because the projector is broken. The teacher cannot use that room today. || Woman: Oh. I heard some people were waiting by the hall. || Man: That is wrong too, because a prize ceremony is happening there. The latest message says [5]we must meet in the language room after lunch[/5]. || Woman: Thanks. I would have gone to the wrong place. || Man: I will tell the others before registration, so nobody misses the start.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Did you see the message about the film group this afternoon? I was going straight to the media room.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: Do not go there, because the projector is broken. The teacher cannot use that room today.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Oh. I heard some people were waiting by the hall.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: That is wrong too, because a prize ceremony is happening there. The latest message says we must meet in the language room after lunch.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Thanks. I would have gone to the wrong place.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: I will tell the others before registration, so nobody misses the start.

items.question: Where should students go for the film group?
items.explanation: The latest message says they must meet in the language room after lunch.

items.context: You hear two people talking about travelling to the theatre.
items.audio_script: Girl: How are you getting to the theatre tomorrow? I thought you were going to go by car. || Boy: I was, but there is nowhere to park nearby, so it is not a good idea now. || Girl: Could you take the bus instead? It might be quicker. || Boy: I checked, but it will not get there in time. [6]I'm taking the train because it arrives ten minutes before the show[/6]. || Girl: That makes sense. When will you arrive? || Boy: Just before ten. I will send you a message when I get there, and we can meet near the entrance.

dialogue.speaker: girl
dialogue.text: How are you getting to the theatre tomorrow? I thought you were going to go by car.

dialogue.speaker: boy
dialogue.text: I was, but there is nowhere to park nearby, so it is not a good idea now.

dialogue.speaker: girl
dialogue.text: Could you take the bus instead? It might be quicker.

dialogue.speaker: boy
dialogue.text: I checked, but it will not get there in time. I'm taking the train because it arrives ten minutes before the show.

dialogue.speaker: girl
dialogue.text: That makes sense. When will you arrive?

dialogue.speaker: boy
dialogue.text: Just before ten. I will send you a message when I get there, and we can meet near the entrance.

items.question: How will the speaker get to the theatre?
items.explanation: The speaker chooses this way of travelling because it arrives ten minutes before the show.

items.context: You hear two people talking about work at the community event.
items.audio_script: Woman: What are you doing at the community event this afternoon? I thought you had to sell cakes. || Man: That was yesterday. Someone else has already done it this morning. || Woman: So are you going to put up decorations instead? || Man: No, because the volunteers finished that this morning. The manager said [7]my job today is to welcome visitors at the door[/7]. || Woman: That sounds manageable. Will you finish by five? || Man: I hope so. If it stays quiet, I should finish early and have time to meet my friends afterwards.

dialogue.text: What are you doing at the community event this afternoon? I thought you had to sell cakes.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: That was yesterday. Someone else has already done it this morning.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: So are you going to put up decorations instead?

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: No, because the volunteers finished that this morning. The manager said my job today is to welcome visitors at the door.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: That sounds manageable. Will you finish by five?

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: I hope so. If it stays quiet, I should finish early and have time to meet my friends afterwards.

items.explanation: The speaker says their job today is to welcome visitors at the door.
